channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bricks have dropped two inches under pavement leve, 5th March
item.description:
Next to a manhole. Trip hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Perth Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 121 Haverstock Hill, 5th March
item.description:
Recent gas repair completed a few days ago. Two collapsing repairs to the road surface. Getting worse and probably dangerous as shown in the photos. Clearly the original repair was not completed properly as the surface has collapsed within a few days. This on both parallel places. Thank you for your attention to this. KNcM
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 117, Haverstock Hill, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ahead of zebra crossing South bound, 5th March
item.description:
This issue has been reported 2 weeks' ago and reportedly fixed, however when passing 2 days ago it was the same. The illuminated sign in photograph alerting drivers to cyclist joining road (if I saw correctly) or at least slowing down is turned the other way and not working. I witnessed a near-collision of cyclist with HGV due to driver not slowing down at all, despite cycling path joining road. Some awareness needs to be raised and clarified who has right of way if this is the case.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Royal College Street, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Carpet dumped, 5th March
item.description:
Yet more fly tipping. Seems people are reporting fly tipping around this location every week. Why are council not addressing this by cctv.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brampton Road, Bexleyheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned street barriers, 5th March
item.description:
They have been there for weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oakhill Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Significant of fly tipped waste, 5th March
item.description:
There is a significant amount of fly tipped waste on the wall to the garden of 37 Magdalene Close. It been here a couple of days at least.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37-48, Magdalene Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another street in this area Used as an open yard storage to fix and park vehicles without number plates, 5th March
item.description:
Another street in this area Used as an open yard storage to fix and park vehicles without number plates. Similar to that of Rolling street. Maybe Lewisham council are waiting for a developer to come along and wave a magic wand. Lazy and inapt council who do nothing. No need to add photos here as there is a camera in this street but maybe they do not know how to use this technology. We will soon reporting this mess to mail online if nothing is done about this area.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hornshay Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two Abandoned mopeds, 5th March
item.description:
By Sainsbury’s entrance to park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Franklin Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole around this drain, 5th March
item.description:
This road defect has been here for ages. It is causing problems for residents on the close, as it is a narrow road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vicarage Court, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped fridge, 5th March
item.description:
This fridge was dumped outside my property at 477 Abbey Road .We haven’t witnessed anything though.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 475, Abbey Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin not been emptied, 5th March
item.description:
Aldersmead Road at park entrance. Overflowing bin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aldersmead Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trolleys blocking pavement, 5th March
item.description:
Trolleys have been dumped here blocking the pavement for 2 weeks now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Edmund Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Reflective panel on central island not reflective damaged, 5th March
item.description:
The panel on the center pedestrian island has no reflective cover, worn away
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westwood Lane, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: High pitched whining noise coming from the streetlight outside the building., 5th March
item.description:
Very annoying dog whistle like noise coming from the street light outside of the building, has been continuous for last 3-4 days. Multiple neighbours reporting same issue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Sisters Avenue, Clapham Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lifted paving slab, 5th March
item.description:
The paving slabs outside my house are basically all broken and loose. A few have been replaced in the path with tarmac but now even that is crumbling away. I think I needs to all be brought up and tarmac’d as one or be re done as the issue keeps recurring

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Harborough Avenue, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Barriers left behind on grass, 5th March
item.description:
These barriers have been left here since November 2025

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 134, Berwick Crescent, Falconwood, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 13 hawley crescent in middle of road, 5th March
item.description:
The pothole was originally filled early January 26. Due to heavy traffic it returned due to road weight. Buses lorry's etc
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Hawley Crescent, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge Freezer & rubbish dumped, 5th March
item.description:
Fridge Freezer & Rubbish dumped by army cadet building along bexley Rd leading towards roundabout Please note I walk by at 5.32 this issue has NOT been fixed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bexley Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Remove, 5th March
item.description:
Please remove asap, I can’t access my bike lock.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Collapsed wall, 5th March
item.description:
This has been broken for months. There are other sections of this wall of this LH-managed building that are also on a state of disrepair, but are arguably less visible. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dartmouth Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
